title: lithocarpus hemisphaericus
intro: Lithocarpus hemisphaericus, also known as the Bur Oak, is a deciduous tree native to the temperate regions of Asia. The medicinal properties of Lithocarpus hemisphaericus are attributed to its bark, leaves, and seeds, which contain compounds that have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Lithocarpus hemisphaericus is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties and health benefits.
